name: Joao Fortes Engenharia S.A.
summary: Jo√É¬£o Fortes Engenharia S.A. develops, constructs, and sells real estate properties in Brazil. The company undertakes residential and commercial building, super quadra, corporate headquarter, shopping mall, hospital, university, and other projects. It is also involved in the construction and administration, and building of cinemas, schools, clubs, sports and leisure centers, hotels, buildings-garage, data centers, research centers, and industrial works for third parties. The company was formerly known as John Strong & Cia Ltda. and changed its name to Jo√É¬£o Fortes Engenharia S.A. in September 1973. Jo√É¬£o Fortes Engenharia S.A. was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
